---
title: "Aim 2 — Melanoma · ICI · Acute Interstitial Nephritis"
author: "Tianqi Ouyang"
date: "2026-06-30"
---

# Project Overview

Aim 2 examines **acute interstitial nephritis (AIN)** in melanoma patients
treated with **immune checkpoint inhibitors (ICI)**, with its own longitudinal
REDCap project and Statistical Analysis Plan (`Tianqi_SAP.docx`).

# Study Arms

| Arm | Definition |
|---|---|
| 1 | Metastatic melanoma receiving ICI |
| 2 | Adjuvant stage II–III melanoma receiving ICI |
| 3 | Control: stage I–IIIA melanoma **not** receiving ICI |

# Data Sources

| Source | Role |
|---|---|
| Longitudinal REDCap export | Demographics, comorbidities, ICI regimen, concomitant medications, baseline eGFR |
| RPDR laboratory pull | Baseline hemoglobin & albumin (closest result to baseline visit) |

REDCap events: `prebaseline_arm_1` (demographics, comorbidities, meds),
`baseline_arm_1` (eGFR, visit date), `early_treatment_we_arm_1` (ICI regimen).

# Key Derived Variables

- **`autoimmune_history`** — any of 18 pre-existing autoimmune comorbidity boxes
- **`baseline_ckd_stage` / `baseline_ckd_binary`** — KDIGO categories of baseline eGFR (binary <60)
- **`baseline_ici_treatment` / `ici_regimen_class`** — ICI regimen and its 4-level mechanism class
- **`AIN_con_med_any`** — exposure to any of 6 AIN-associated medication classes (structured field **or** `con_med` free-text)
- **`baseline_hgb` / `baseline_albumin`** — RPDR labs closest to the baseline visit (±30 days)

See **Variable Creation** for the full SAP-specified derivation logic.
